title: Midterm Exam 1 Scores
content:
Hi Everyone,

Congratulations on finishing your first midterm. The scores are now posted. Overall, the results were in line with where scores typically fall for this class.

If you’d like to go over your exam, we’ll hold office hours next week for review. I’ll share specific times soon.

I know exams can be stressful, so take a moment to appreciate the work you’ve put in so far. Wishing you a restful and enjoyable weekend.

Best,
Professor Contreras
